Here’s today’s cat…
no, wait—today’s #MaritimeMonday.
#ROCMC https://t.co/S5XeMrbDyt

2 sorties of PLA aircraft and 8 PLAN vessels operating around Taiwan were detected up until 6 a.m. (UTC+8) today. 2 out of 2 sorties crossed the median line and entered Taiwan’s southwestern ADIZ. We have monitored the situation and responded. https://t.co/x0zyZXwRZN

9 sorties of PLA aircraft and 9 PLAN vessels operating around Taiwan were detected up until 6 a.m. (UTC+8) today. 3 out of 9 sorties crossed the median line and entered Taiwan’s southwestern ADIZ. We have monitored the situation and responded. https://t.co/Ans7eecs7f

At 0541hrs (UTC+8), a PLA reconnaissance UAV was detected entering Taiwan’s southwestern ADIZ and entering airspace near Dongsha (the Pratas Islands). After radio warnings, the UAV departed the area. The #ROCArmedForces are monitoring the situation and responding accordingly.

26 PLA aircraft, 8 PLAN vessels and 1 official ship operating around Taiwan were detected up until 6 a.m. (UTC+8) today. 7 out of 26 sorties crossed the median line and entered Taiwan’s northern, central and southwestern ADIZ. We have monitored the situation and responded. https://t.co/8ffV9WK4ZF

Challenges are part of everyday life.
Rough seas may lie along our routes.

But don’t worry.
The #ROCArmedForces are always here. https://t.co/lsanPJvIU5

Guided by prudent threat assessment, the #ROCArmedForces have completed force adjustments and maintain appropriate response mechanisms.

We will continue to respond calmly and in a controlled manner, firmly safeguarding sovereignty, democracy, freedom, and our people’s safety.

Living in the Republic of China means enjoying the everyday life in freedom, democracy, and peace.
Preserving the public’s sense of normalcy is the principle we will not compromise.
Safeguarding daily "lives" is the mission of the #ROCArmedForces. https://t.co/73Xzi4bym8

Steady. 
A mindset, and a posture. 

Our routine readiness and training 
are what allow us, at this moment, to draw on deep preparation and respond with calm confidence. 

When the #ROCArmedForces stand steady, our nation stands secure. https://t.co/rxvjSs1lMY

Minister of National Defense Wellington Koo said today that the PLA’s provocative actions threaten regional stability and civilian traffic. Following the President’s guidance, the #ROCArmedForces will respond calmly and safeguard our nation’s security and democracy. https://t.co/5NUsWVPl7W

In response to today’s #PLA aircraft and naval activity, the #ROCArmedForces conducted Rapid Response Exercises and closely monitored the situation. Joint sea and air operations with all services and the Taiwan Coast Guard remain on high alert. #FullAwareness https://t.co/urRlOh4cUL

We strongly condemn the PRC’s irrational provocations and oppose the PLA’s actions that undermine regional peace.
Rapid Response Exercises are underway, with forces on high alert to defend the Republic of China and protect our people.
#ROCArmedForces
#PeaceThroughStrength https://t.co/uPw0Qm9Upn
